ICaptchaValidator Properties

One Identity Manager API Server

The ICaptchaValidator type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
CaseInsensitive
Gets or sets a flag indicating whether the code check is case-sensitive.
TestKey
Gets or sets a constant CAPTCHA code that will always be accepted.
